personalInfo.name: Karthick
personalInfo.title: Junior Software Engineer
personalInfo.bio: I am a passionate Software Engineer with hands-on industry experience at Brimma Tech, including practical experience in DevOps. I work on backend development, rule engine implementation, intelligent document processing, and deployment workflows. I have integrated Azure AI services, managed reporting databases, built Grafana dashboards, and contributed to CI/CD pipelines and cloud-based deployments. I enjoy solving complex problems and building scalable, reliable, and production-ready systems.

projects.title: FarAway
projects.description: A React-based tour packing list application utilizing state management to streamline packing with interactive item tracking.

projects.title: QR Code Generator
projects.description: A responsive and interactive QR code generator built with NodeJS, HTML, and CSS.

projects.title: Railway Ticket Reservation
projects.description: A comprehensive system offering features like ticket booking, cancellation, waiting list management, and RAC, providing a seamless reservation experience.

projects.title: BankList
projects.description: The ultimate app for effortless bank account management, simplifying finances with an intuitive interface.
